title: PAN-OS: OS Command Injection Vulnerability in GlobalProtect Gateway
description: A command injection vulnerability in the GlobalProtect feature of Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS software for specific PAN-OS versions and distinct feature configurations may enable an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code with root privileges on the firewall.

_fixture_note: SAMPLE DATA — NOT live intelligence. For testing and demonstration only.
title: Type Confusion in V8 JavaScript Engine in Google Chrome
description: Type confusion in V8 in Google Chrome prior to 128.0.6613.84 allowed a remote attacker to exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. Google is aware that an exploit for CVE-2024-7971 exists in the wild.

_fixture_note: SAMPLE DATA — NOT live intelligence. For testing and demonstration only.
title: Microsoft Message Queuing (MSMQ) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
description: A remote code execution vulnerability exists in Microsoft Message Queuing (MSMQ) when the Windows message queuing service is enabled. An unauthenticated attacker could send a specially crafted malicious MSMQ packet to a MSMQ server and achieve remote code execution on the server side.

_fixture_note: SAMPLE DATA — NOT live intelligence. For testing and demonstration only.
title: FortiOS: Out-of-Bound Write in SSL VPN May Lead to RCE
description: An out-of-bounds write vulnerability in Fortinet FortiOS versions 6.0 through 7.4 SSL VPN web management interface may allow a remote unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code or command via specially crafted HTTP requests.

_fixture_note: SAMPLE DATA — NOT live intelligence. For testing and demonstration only.
title: Veeam Backup & Replication: Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution
description: A deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability in Veeam Backup & Replication allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code remotely. The affected component is accessible over the default Veeam service port.
